verdict_summary: proceed — substitution anxiety confirmed at 23% abandonment; slot viz is a quick win, not the main play

convergence.finding: Delivery slot confidence visualization is low-effort and addresses a real (if smaller than assumed) pain point
Substitution anxiety is a real driver of cart abandonment for Weekly Basket Builders

side_a.position: Delivery slot anxiety is a significant conversion barrier worth addressing
side_a.evidence: Competitive analysis shows slot visualization is table stakes

side_b.position: Delivery slot abandonment is only 8% of total — payment step (34%) is the real bottleneck
side_b.evidence: Funnel analysis — last 60 days, properly segmented

counter_signals.summary: Delivery slot abandonment is only 8% of total — payment step at 34% is the real bottleneck, challenging assumption asm-002

strongest_signal.summary: Cart abandonment at substitution step is 23% — confirms the core hypothesis

strongest_counter_signal.summary: Delivery slots are only 8% of abandonment — challenges assumption asm-002

artifacts.description: Interactive prototype of persistent grocery list with substitution preferences
Engineering spec for delivery slot confidence visualization

rationale: The core hypothesis (substitution anxiety drives abandonment) is supported by both quantitative data (23% of abandonments) and prototype testing. However, the secondary assumption about delivery slots is weaker than expected. Recommend proceeding with substitution preferences as primary initiative, slot visualization as a quick win, and deprioritizing broader slot anxiety work until payment step friction is investigated.
expected_impact: Add-to-Cart rate increase of 3-5 percentage points within 8 weeks for Weekly Basket Builder segment, based on 23% substitution abandonment reduction.
estimated_effort: Substitution preferences: 4-6 sprints (new microservice or InstaShop adaptation). Slot visualization: 2 sprints (frontend only).

solutions.title: Substitution Preference Engine — let users set replacement rules
solutions.description: Allow users to pre-set substitution preferences per item category, reducing surprise replacements.
solutions.rationale: Addresses the 23% substitution abandonment directly with minimal infrastructure.
solutions.expected_impact: 3-5% add-to-cart rate increase for Weekly Basket Builders

solutions.title: Delivery Slot Confidence Viz — real-time slot availability indicator
solutions.description: Visual indicator showing delivery slot confidence level during checkout.
solutions.rationale: Quick frontend win — 2 sprints, addresses 8% slot-related abandonment.

solutions.title: Smart Basket Builder — AI-powered recurring order optimization
solutions.description: ML-driven system that learns user patterns, predicts weekly baskets, pre-handles substitutions, and optimizes delivery windows.
solutions.rationale: Highest potential but requires ML pipeline and significant backend investment. Defer until simpler solutions validate the hypothesis.
